ADR limitations
nodes.rationale: ADRs are useful because decisions live near code, but static diagrams, ordering conventions and limited Markdown viewers make them decay.

nodes.label: Single authoritative source
nodes.rationale: Knowledge should have one authoritative source; derived documentation should be automated or treated like maintained code.
